title: Shrimp Skillet with Greek Flair
description: A flavorful and quick skillet dish made with succulent shrimp, garlicky goodness, and a hint of Greek spices.
instructions: Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlicky butter and let it melt.
Add the shrimp and sprinkle with cinnamon and Greek seasoning.
Cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the shrimp reach an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Remove the shrimp and set aside.
Add any remaining garlicky butter to the skillet.
Serve the shrimp with the skillet contents.
Garnish with additional Greek seasoning, if desired.
